basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical and Health Office Dantewada (CMHO Dantewada) Nursing Officer (DT) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the CMHO Dantewada Nursing Officer (DT) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B.Sc. Nursing OR Post B.Sc. Nursing Live Registration in Chhattisgarh Nursing Registration Council

content_sections.heading: CMHO Dantewada Nursing Officer (DT) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CMHO Dantewada Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CMHO Dantewada Nursing Officer (DT) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CMHO Dantewada Nursing Officer (DT) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CMHO Dantewada Nursing Officer (DT) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CMHO Dantewada Nursing Officer (DT) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the CMHO Dantewada Nursing Officer (DT) Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Nursing Officer (DT) post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Nursing Officer (DT) post is B.Sc. Nursing or Post B.Sc. Nursing, along with Live Registration in the Chhattisgarh Nursing Registration Council.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Nursing Officer (DT) post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Nursing Officer (DT) post is between 18 years and 40 years as of 1st July 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Nursing Officer (DT) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Nursing Officer (DT) post will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Nursing Officer (DT) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Nursing Officer (DT) post by the Chief Medical and Health Office Dantewada.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit, with 70% weightage given to educational qualifications and 30% weightage to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the CMHO Dantewada Nursing Officer (DT) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview venue.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Nursing Officer (DT) post is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before attending the interview.
